DESC_EMAIL_STEP: No worries! Enter your email address below and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
DESC_RESET_STEP: Create a new password for your account. Make sure it's strong and secure.
PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters long
EMAIL_SENT_SUCCESS_DESC: We've sent a password reset link to
EMAIL_SENT_NOTE: The link will expire in 1 hour. If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.
PASSWORD_RESET_SUCCESS_DESC: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now log in with your new password.
